case_title: CHIRAG INVESTMENT COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA VS. MICHAEL EUGENE TONEY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIRAG INVESTMENT COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP SERVED JUN-10-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TONEY, MICHAEL EUGENE
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $370.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TONEY, MICHAEL EUGENE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIRAG INVESTMENT COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TONEY, MICHAEL EUGENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 465 GROVE ST. #106, S.F. CA. 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT TONEY, MICHAEL EUGENE
DECLARATION PER CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIRAG INVESTMENT COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIRAG INVESTMENT COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT TONEY, MICHAEL EUGENE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TONEY, MICHAEL EUGENE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $85.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIRAG INVESTMENT COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TONEY, MICHAEL EUGENE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIRAG INVESTMENT COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TONEY, MICHAEL EUGENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 7/11/07, $7,735.00 RENT, $370.00 COSTS, $2,805.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES,, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,910.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
